title: Zornak
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Zornak-E14.jpg]] |name=Zornak |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=A [[Zornak's species|sentient species]][[Ewoks (1985) 14|''Ewoks'' (1985) 14]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|As soon as the Ewoks wear our stones of obedience, they will do our bidding!|Zornak|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Zornak''' was an [[Zornak's species|alien]] who came to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in a [[Zornak's spaceship|starship]] with his crew and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] to procure precious [[Gemstone/Legends|gems]] for his crew. Using the [[stones of obedience]], he was able to get the Ewoks under his control, and he had them load the gems onto his [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. However, a lone unaffected Ewok named [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] learned of Zornak's plans and, after freeing another [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Ewok]] from his influence, was able to use the stones against Zornak, forcing him to leave Endor and free all of the Ewoks. ==Biography== ===Controlling the Ewoks=== {{Quote|Now give these to the rest of your people and tell them they must listen to ''me!''''"
"''We ''must obey!''|Zornak|}} [[File:DisguisedZornak.jpg|thumb|right|270px|A disguised Zornak]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Zornak was an [[Zornak's species|alien]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who traveled in a [[Zornak's spaceship|starship]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which include the events of [[Ewoks (1985) 14|''Ewoks'' 14]], to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. he and at least one other [[Zornak's companion|member]] of his [[Species/Legends|species]] traveled to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], where they intended to use the [[stones of obedience]] to [[Slavery/Legends|enslave]] the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]. Once Zornak's [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] had found the [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Ewoks' village]], his companion reported to him, and Zornak had the latter ready the [[transport chamber]] so that he could be transported to the village. Zornak put on a [[Robe/Legends|robe]] to disguise himself and was teleported to the village, where he greeted two [[Youngling/Legends|young]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]: [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]]. They asked who he was, and he claimed that was merely a traveler seeking hospitality, offering the stones of obedience as gifts. Kintaka started to decline, feeling it was unnecessary. Warrick did not want to hurt the alien's feelings, however, so he accepted the gifts on behalf of both of them. Zornak then instructed the two Ewoks to put them on, which put them under his control. As they had to obey, they followed his orders to give the stones to the rest of the villagers, telling them that they had to listen to the alien traveler. ===A plan foiled=== {{Quote|Shall I ''pursue'' him?''"
"''No! You'd never find him in those dense woods! But… one of his ''own kind'' can!|Zornak's companion and Zornak|}} [[File:ZornakWicket.jpg|thumb|left|270px|Zornak (right) and Wicket Warrick]] Zornak and his companion rounded up all of the Ewoks, forcing them to load their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] with precious [[Gemstone/Legends|gems]]. However, unbeknown to them, a lone Ewok, [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], was never given a stone of obedience, so he learned of Zornak's plan while hiding nearby. Once Zornak's probe [[Droid/Legends|droid]] had found Teebo, he ran off into the [[Forest/Legends|forests]]. Zornak's companion intended to chase after him in the [[Wood/Legends|woods]], but Zornak reminded him that they were too dense, so he instead sent one of Teebo's own kind: Wicket Warrick. Zornak ordered Warrick to use a [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun weapon]] to capture the runaway Teebo. However, Teebo was able to knock the stone of obedience off of Warrick, breaking him free of Zornak's control. The two then devised a plan to free the villagers; Warrick would again wear the stone, but he would instead be controlled by Teebo. The plan was executed by Warrick bringing Teebo back to Zornak, pretending to still be under his influence. He prepared to place a stone on Teebo's neck, but it was then that he gave Warrick the signal, which prompted him to put a stone on Zornak, forcing him to be under their command. They ordered him to give an order to free all of the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] and leave Endor at once, which he promptly obeyed, giving his crewmates a command to do so and taking off in their starship. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|While they wear the stones of obedience, they must listen to me.. the one who gave it to them!|Zornak|}} Zornak was willing to enslave the Ewoks of Endor and had no qualms about taking away their free will. He had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Skills and abilities== Under the guise of simply being a traveler, he was able to convince the Ewoks to all wear the stones of obedience. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Ready the transport chamber! I will go to the village!|Zornak|}} Zornak traveled in a starship that resembled a flying [[Castle/Legends|castle]]. He wore pink [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] that had yellow sleeves along with blue [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] and [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and he donned a blue-and-pink [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] on his head, all of which was covered by a pink [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] when he was disguised as a traveler. He also used a transport chamber to travel to the Ewok village. ==Behind the scenes== Zornak appeared as the main antagonist in the [[Ewoks (1985) 14|fourteenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[David Manak]], illustrated by [[Warren Kremer]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[March 31]], [[1987]].{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 51|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[June]] [[1987]]|issn=8750-4367}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Zornak}} *[[Ewoks (1985) 14|''Ewoks'' (1985) 14]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Captains]] [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of Zornak's species]]
